decision: Gate G passed for local provider adapter kernel.
summary: Reviewed generated ok and forced-drift provider evidence. The ok output has drift_detected false, forced drift has non-empty drift reasons, raw output refs/digests and zero-cost facts are present, and no real provider or external side effect occurred.
recommendation_for_human: Proceed to the devmasterd local control-plane activation proposal only. Do not start daemon implementation, Web Console, IDE extension, real provider calls, subscription CLI daemonization, or external repo mutation from this gate.
notes: Gate G pass validates local provider adapter evidence only.
